summary: Add tier and features billing metadata fields to AppConfig interface and all registry entries, with test coverage.
implementation: 1. In apps/web/lib/app-registry.ts, add to AppConfig interface: `tier: "free" | "pro" | "enterprise"` and `features: Record<string, "free" | "pro" | "enterprise">`. 2. Add `tier: "free", features: {}` to all 27 app entries in the apps array. 3. In apps/web/lib/__tests__/app-registry.test.ts, add two tests: (a) every app has a valid tier value (one of free/pro/enterprise), (b) every app has a features object (typeof === 'object').

testing.reason: The interface and all registry entries are changing. Tests must validate every app has valid tier and features values.

verification.reason: Schema-only change with no UI impact. No runtime enforcement or user-visible changes to verify in a browser.
